desc: Spawns a creeper near your location.
Spawns a model using the specified ID.
Sets the wanted level of the specified player(s).
Spawns a car near your location.
Gives space weapons to the target(s).
Spawns a peacekeeper near your location.
Spawns a hostile NPC near your location.
Spawns a soldier near your location.
Spawns an attack robot near your location.
Spawns a robot leader near your location.
Spawns a UFO at a random location which deploys aliens.
Spawns the mothership at a random location.
Gives a magic wand to the target(s).
Gives a death laser to the target(s).
Spawns a runner zombie near your location.
Spawns a normal zombie near your location.
Sets the WalkSpeed of the specified target.
Grants a ForceField to the target.
Removes a ForceField from the target.
Respawns the target player.
Instantly kills the target player.
Teleports you to the target player.
Teleports the target player to your location.
Gives a golden revolver to the target.
Spectates the specified player.
Stops spectating a player.
Launches the specified target into the air.
Freezes the specified target.
Continuously kills the target(s) until stopped.
Stops the loopkill effect on the target(s).
Transforms the target into Darth Vader.
Starts a riot of hostile NPCs near the bank and spawns peacekeepers.
Adds candy to the target (Halloween only).
Kicks the target player from the server.
Permanently bans the target player.
Bans the target player for 7 days.
Adds cash to the target's balance.
Removes cash from the target's balance.
Sets the target's cash balance to the specified amount.
